## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Sunbit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy progress and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy showing early success: 400+ active users, 1.5min+ avg. time on site for key articles](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Expanding focus to include B2B dental content to support lead generation efforts](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Exploring new content types: calculators, location-based landing pages for services](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Sunbit seeing overall site traffic growth, aiming for 10M visitors this year](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [400+ active users on new content](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Top performing articles: Clear Aligner 101, tire rotation tips, synthetic vs. conventional oil](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Strong engagement: 1.5min+ avg. time on site for key articles](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Google indexing new content quickly, manual submissions helping](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Jason created GA4 report to track performance](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)

### Content Strategy Expansion

  - [Shifting focus to include B2B dental content for lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [David to research keywords from Jason's dental professionals topics list](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [Exploring new content types:](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
      - [Calculators for various services](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
      - [Location-based landing pages (e.g., "veneers in Chicago", "orthodontics with financing in Dallas-Fort Worth")](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)

### Site-wide Growth

  - [Sunbit seeing traffic growth since March](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [Attributed to shop directory revisions, FAQ updates, and increased useful content](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Jason aiming for 10M site visitors this year](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)

### Workflow Updates

  - [Nico created new social media workflow](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [David tweaking for less generic content, exploring emoji integration](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [GrowthX building Looker Studio dashboard to visualize URL-specific progress](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Team Introduction

  - [Tiandra Burns joined as new content manager with fintech background](https://fathom.video/share/8wRcPxyMat9zesrehSEqsKNojyyycExN?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)

## Next Steps
